title: cephalaria flava subsp. setulifera
intro: Cephalaria flava subsp. setulifera, also known as yellow cephalaria or goat's beard, is a flowering plant belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal agent. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against various infections. In herbal preparations, Cephalaria flava subsp. setulifera is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is required to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
